hooks.command: plugin_root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$plugin_root" ]; then hook="$plugin_root/hooks/refresh-marketplace.sh"; if [ ! -f "$hook" ] && [ -n "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then case "$plugin_root" in */plugins/cache/*/*/*) for candidate in "${plugin_root%/*}"/*/hooks/refresh-marketplace.sh; do if [ -f "$candidate" ]; then hook="$candidate"; plugin_root="${candidate%/hooks/refresh-marketplace.sh}"; fi; done ;; esac; fi; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then if [ -n "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then PLUGIN_ROOT="$plugin_root" bash "$hook"; else CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$plugin_root" bash "$hook"; fi; fi; fi
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pluginRoot = $env:PLUGIN_ROOT; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($pluginRoot)) { $pluginRoot = $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT }; if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($pluginRoot)) { $hook = Join-Path $pluginRoot 'hooks\refresh-marketplace.ps1'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $hook -PathType Leaf) { & $hook } }"
